case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ZULMA ARELI BONILLA GOMEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,472.79 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY KNOW AS PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA GOMEZ, ZULMA ARELI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY KNOW AS PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BONILLA GOMEZ, ZULMA ARELI $2,472.79 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,567.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.00) SERVED MAR-21-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA GOMEZ, ZULMA ARELI
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY KNOW AS PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
